title: Revoted
body:
This Is Revoted. The Ultimate MOB Vote Mod. This Mod is a re-imagining of all the features that got lost to the Minecon/Minecraft Live votes. Adding new Features, Mechanics, Items and More to the game.

 
Currently, the Mod only contains the 2021 Mobs (Glare and Copper Golem) but more features are to come. The 2017 Vote will be the next update. More rejected mobs and features will also come as a result of this.

 


Version: 1.18.2 Forge

Dependencies: Geckolib (Download Here: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/geckolib)

Optional Dependencies: Patchouli
